name: Conversation
description: SMS conversation thread between a ConversationPhoneNumber (sender) and a citizen (PartnerPhoneNumber). In Layer 0: no CustomerId or CreatedByUserId stored directly — CustomerId lives on ConversationPhoneNumbers, CreatedByUserId is workContext.CurrentUserId at runtime only.

fields.name: CustomerId
fields.note: UNKNOWN: CustomerId not stored on Conversation in Layer 0. Only reachable via ConversationPhoneNumbers join or workContext.

fields.name: CreatedByUserId
fields.source_col: NOT IN DB — workContext.CurrentUserId used at runtime only
fields.note: UNKNOWN: CreatedByUserId not persisted in Layer 0 Conversations table.

fields.name: CreatedAt
fields.source_col: NOT ON Conversations — ConversationMessages.DateCreatedUtc exists but not on Conversation
fields.note: UNKNOWN: CreatedAt column does not exist on Conversations table in Layer 0.

name: ConversationParticipant
description: UNKNOWN: No ConversationParticipants table exists in Layer 0. Closest equivalent is ConversationPhoneNumberProfileMappings (links profiles to phone numbers, not conversations to users). The Owner/Participant role concept does not exist in Layer 0.

fields.name: Role
fields.source_col: NO role enum on any participants table

closest_note: Layer 0 links ProfileId to ConversationPhoneNumberId — not UserId to ConversationId.

name: ConversationPhoneNumber
description: Virtual sender phone number assigned to a customer. Carries CustomerId. Used by CreateConversation to determine customer scope and profile access.

name: ConversationPhoneNumberProfileMapping
description: Maps which profiles have access to a ConversationPhoneNumber. Used in authorization check during CreateConversation to verify caller's profile is permitted.

name: CreateConversationCommand
description: Input command for creating a new SMS conversation. Issued by an authenticated user via HTTP POST. Contains sender phone number reference and partner (citizen) phone details plus the first message text.
